snow-white-heavy-arms.name: Snow White: Heavy Arms

findings: Auto-Fire hit count KIT-EXACT (over-count ruled out — burst boosts loaded ammo 5->15). 1.073 HOT = bond warming + cadence ⚑ (sim assumes optimum). F1 DEF 42.24 dropped (hard rule 3); F2 Pierce 5s missing (hasPierce unset). Backfilled

snow-white-heavy-arms.evidence: probe u7 team-two — seven burst windows observed end-to-end, Fully-Active ends-on-uses measured; run C 0.95

skill1: Lock-On — Function: Designates the enemy as a target of Seven Dwarves. Max Lock-On targets: 5. Deactivation condition: Performing a normal attack or taking cover.
Auto Fire Ready — Effect: DEF ▲ 42.24% continuously.
Auto Fire Ready — Function: Loads Seven Dwarves with ammo. Max ammo loaded by Auto Fire Ready: 5. Deactivation condition: Performing a normal attack.
■ Activates when performing a normal attack while not in Full Burst. Affects self. Removes Seven Dwarves Fully Active.
burst: Seven Dwarves Fully Active — Function: Increases max number of Lock-On targets and max ammo loaded by Auto Fire Ready, but also increases Charge Time.
■ Affects all destructible projectiles. Deals 41.9% of final ATK as damage.
